Class ConsoleView

java.lang.Object
com.runticket.view.ConsoleView
public class ConsoleView extends Object
The ConsoleView class handles all console output for the TicketMiner application. It provides methods to display menus, messages, and formatted information to the user.
Author:
Adrian Sifuentes, Henry Ng, Sebastian Marquez

    • displayEventRevenue

      public void displayEventRevenue(Event event)
      Displays event revenue information. This method calls the event's eventRevenue() method to display revenue information.
      Parameters:
      event - the event for which to display revenue information

    • displayInvoice

      public void displayInvoice(Invoice invoice)
      Displays invoice information.
      Parameters:
      invoice - the invoice to display
